sys_script_fix.description:
NOTE: update in 2.8.4 | 2023-11-06 | STRY0146507 - Certification Failed Test Results - Provided the updates required to keep in product STRY0141376 - Placeholder - Fixed Script for Organizational Privacy Move Task Administrators field from every office to the Top OU of each org structure.
Release Introduced: 2.8.3 - Only needs to be run a single time
Purpose: - This script moves the Task Administrator List to the Top OU Only - The 2.8 release looks at the Top OU to vastly improve performance. - The field did not exist before 2.8. - All scripts were updated to use this when checking for administrators - All CRUD scripts were updated to set these values when they change - Previously every office in the OU was updated when either of these list fields changed.
- Set the default OU Privacy setting to "Open"
Validation: TASK ADMINISTRATOR MOVE LIST TO TOP OU - Open the Organizational Hierarchy Table - /x_153465_discovert_discover_office_hierarchy_list.do - Add the Task Administrators field "Task Administrators" to the list - Filter to show only Top OUs - RESULT: All fields should be populated - Filter to show NO Top OUs - RESULT: All fields should be empty
ORGANIZATIONAL PRIVACY SET DEFAULT TO "OPEN" - Open the Organizational Hierarchy Table - /x_153465_discovert_discover_office_hierarchy_list.do - Add the Organizational Privacy field "Organizational Privacy" to the list - Filter to show Empty or blank fields
If any Errors occurs while processing OUs, the error will be written to the log in this format: Log Level - Error Message - "OU Name:[ouName] - - Error in '2.8.3 Fix Script Task Admin / OU Privacy' - exception: " + error
If any values are wrong for either test above, report the differences to the DTech Apps support team.
sys_script_fix.name: 2.8.3 Fix Script Task Admin / OU Privacy
sys_script_fix.sys_name: 2.8.3 Fix Script Task Admin / OU Privacy
